description: You are a litigation support analyst handling a civil lawsuit involving intellectual property theft. Your task is to process the suspect's seized USB drive image located at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd by creating a forensic case named 'Litigation_Support_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-EDISC-01') in Autopsy. Using the Hash Lookup and File Type Identification modules, identify and natively extract all allocated user files—excluding directories, deleted/unallocated files, and NTFS system metafiles (e.g., $MFT)—to /home/ga/Reports/eDiscovery/Natives/. Generate a pipe-delimited (|) load file at /home/ga/Reports/eDiscovery/load_file.dat with the header CONTROL_NUMBER|FILENAME|ORIGINAL_PATH|SIZE_BYTES|MIME_TYPE|MD5_HASH|EXPORT_PATH, ensuring each extracted file is documented with its metadata, a unique control number, and its absolute export path.
